summary: Label the connected foreground components of a hard mask (coverage >= 0.5) into a u32 LabelMap (0 = background) plus a report of the component count and per-label areas. Connectivity (4 or 8) is an explicit param; labels are numbered in raster-scan order of each component's first pixel (a stable, deterministic policy).

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: The hard mask whose foreground (coverage >= 0.5) components are labeled.

outputs.name: labels
outputs.doc: The u32 label map: 0 for background, 1..=count for the raster-scan-ordered components.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The component count, connectivity, and per-label pixel areas.

params.name: connectivity
params.doc: Pixel adjacency: 4 (orthogonal) or 8 (orthogonal + diagonal). Default 8; any other value is rejected.

perceptual.reason: connected-component labeling is exact integer topology verified by synthetic multi-blob fixtures, 4- vs 8-connectivity counts, label stability, and large-ID round trips; there is no perceptual metric
